description: All authored Freddy Fractions dialogue. Keys map 1:1 to MP3 filenames in /public/audio/. Lines may contain {{NAME}} which is split at build time so the kid's name MP3 is stitched at runtime (see PRD §3.11).

voice.notes: Super Mario meets Jersey Shore — Italian-American chef energy, warm, lovable, expressive.

lines.aha_setup: Hey {{NAME}}, want to see something cool? I just pulled this fresh pizza outta the oven — it's already cut in half. Try slicing one of those halves once more, just for me.
lines.aha_wrong_slice: Hey, nice cut! But try slicing one of the halves we already made, alright?
lines.aha_stuck: C'mon, [NAME] — try tapping the slicer on one of those halves.
lines.aha_compare_prompt: Beautiful! Now drag those two quarters right next to a half. Tell me what you notice.
lines.aha_not_equal: Hmm, those ain't quite the same yet. Try moving them right up against each other.
lines.aha_stuck_compare: Slide the quarters right up against the half, [NAME]. You'll see it.
lines.aha_reveal: Whoa, {{NAME}}! Look at that — one half is the SAME as two quarters! You just made fraction equivalence! Bellissimo!
